basic_details.job_title: CGSSB Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 36 Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Office of the Controller, Food and Drug Administration (CFDA), Chhattisgarh
basic_details.notification_number: ESTB-101/49/2025-SECTION(CFDA); Exam Advt. S.S.B./Pariksha F-20/2026/2871, dated 06.07.2026
basic_details.post_name: Namuna Sahayak, Lab Assistant (Aushadhi), Lab Assistant (Khadya)
basic_details.short_information: CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification has been released by the Office of the Controller, Food and Drug Administration (CFDA), Chhattisgarh, for direct recruitment to 36 posts of Namuna Sahayak, Lab Assistant (Aushadhi), and Lab Assistant (Khadya). This is an Application Open stage recruitment, with online applications accepted through the Chhattisgarh Karmchari Chayan Mandal (CGSSB) portal from 07.07.2026 to 31.07.2026, as per Advertisement No. ESTB-101/49/2025-SECTION(CFDA) and Exam Advertisement No. S.S.B./Pariksha F-20/2026/2871 dated 06.07.2026. This single r

application_fee.details: Fee must be paid online at the time of application submission. As per Chhattisgarh Government norms, local resident candidates of Chhattisgarh who appear for the examination will have their exam fee refunded to the same bank account used for payment, after the declaration of results.

age_limit.details: Age is reckoned as on 01.01.2025 for all three posts. | Namuna Sahayak: Minimum 18 years, Maximum 30 years Lab Assistant (Aushadhi): Minimum 18 years, Maximum 30 years Lab Assistant (Khadya): Minimum 18 years, Maximum 30 years | Local resident candidates of Chhattisgarh are eligible for 5 years relaxation in the upper age limit, that is, up to 35 years. Candidates belonging to SC, ST, and Other Backward Classes (non-creamy layer) are eligible for a further 5 years relaxation in the upper age limit. As per the Chhattisgarh Civil Service (Special Provision for Appointment of Women) Rules, 1997, women candidates are eligible for a maximum of 10 years relaxation in the upper age limit. Upper age relaxation for local resident candidates of Chhattisgarh is also subject to time-to-time notifications issued by the General Administration Department.

qualification.details: These posts are open only to local residents (domiciles) of Chhattisgarh state. Candidates who are not local residents of Chhattisgarh are not eligible to apply for direct recruitment to these posts.

salary_details.details: All three posts, Namuna Sahayak, Lab Assistant (Aushadhi), and Lab Assistant (Khadya), carry the same pay scale. | Selected candidates will be appointed on a 3-year probationary period as per Chhattisgarh Civil Service rules.

selection_process: District Code District Name College/Exam Centre
11 Surguja (Ambikapur) Rajiv Gandhi Government P.G. College, Ambikapur
13 Bilaspur Government E. Raghavendra Rao Post Graduate Science College, Bilaspur
16 Durg Vishwanath Tamaskar Government Arts and Science College, Durg
25 Raipur Government Nagarjuna P.G. Science College, Raipur
Selection for all three posts will be made through a written examination conducted by CGSSB
followed by document verification and medical fitness checks by the department.
The written exam will be a single question paper of 100 marks
each carrying 1 mark. Candidates will get 2 hours to attempt the paper. Each question has four options

and the correct option must be marked on the OMR sheet using a blue or black ballpoint pen. Negative marking applies: 1/4 mark will be deducted for each wrong answer. Final merit will be determined based on marks scored in the written examination. Selection of eligible candidates will be made by the Departmental Selection Committee based on merit. Original certificates of shortlisted candidates will be verified by the Office of the Controller

before appointment. Selected candidates must produce a fitness certificate from the District Hospital Medical Board before joining service. Police verification (character verification) will be conducted after the candidate joins duty. A waiting list will also be released for these posts
valid for one year from the date of release.
how_to_apply: Local resident candidates of Chhattisgarh can apply online for these posts from 07.07.2026 to 31.07.2026 by following the steps below.
Visit the official website vyapamcg.cgstate.gov.in or cgssb.cgstate.gov.in.
Complete Profile Registration on the portal, if not already done.
Read the departmental recruitment rules and sample application form carefully before applying.
Fill in the online application form for the desired post: Namuna Sahayak, Lab Assistant (Aushadhi), or Lab Assistant (Khadya).
Pay the prescribed examination fee through online mode.
Click "SUBMIT" to finally submit the application after successful fee payment.
Take a mandatory printout of the submitted application form and retain it for future reference.
Corrections to submitted applications can be made only during the correction window from 01.08.2026 to 03.08.2026.
important_instructions: Only local residents of Chhattisgarh are eligible to apply for direct recruitment to these posts. Candidates must ensure they meet all eligibility conditions before applying; the responsibility of verifying eligibility lies solely with the candidate. Merely applying or appearing for the examination does not guarantee selection; ineligible candidates can be disqualified at any stage. The number of vacancies advertised is subject to change. Reservation in these recruitments and selection processes is subject to the final order/decision in SLP(C) No. 19668/2022 pending before the Supreme Court of India. Male candidates having more than one living spouse, and female candidates who married such a man, are disqualified from appointment under Chhattisgarh Civil Service (General Conditions of Service) Rules, 1961, except with government exemption. Candidates found to be physically or mentally unfit are not eligible for appointment. If any candidate is found exerting political pressure or influencing the selection process, their application will be rejected and candidature cancelled at any stage. No travel allowance or other allowance will be paid to candidates for appearing in any level of the selection examination. The admit card will be uploaded on the CGSSB website approximately 7 days before the exam and will not be sent by post. Candidates must reach the exam centre at least 2 hours before the exam for frisking and identity verification. Light-coloured, half-sleeve clothing is mandatory; dark-coloured clothing and jewellery are prohibited inside the exam hall. Selected candidates will be appointed on probation for 3 years and must submit a medical fitness certificate and complete police verification before/after joining.

rows.date: Along with online application, up to 31.07.2026

content_sections.heading: CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: The 36 vacancies are spread across three posts under the Food and Drug Administration Department, Chhattisgarh, reserved exclusively for local residents of the state. UR stands for Unreserved, SC for Scheduled Caste, ST for Scheduled Tribe, and OBC for Other Backward Classes. As per Chhattisgarh Government policy, 30 percent horizontal reservation applies for women, 10 percent horizontal and compartment-wise reservation for Ex-Servicemen, and 7 percent horizontal reservation for persons with disabilities across all advertised posts. The number of vacancies is subject to change as per the notification.

rows.department: Public Health and Family Welfare Department (field-level, state-wide)

content_sections.heading: CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: These posts are open only to local residents (domiciles) of Chhattisgarh state. Candidates who are not local residents of Chhattisgarh are not eligible to apply for direct recruitment to these posts.

rows.qualification_required: Higher Secondary (10+2) examination passed in Science stream (including Chemistry) from a recognized board
Higher Secondary (10+2) examination passed in Science stream (including Chemistry) from a recognized board
Higher Secondary (10+2) examination passed in Science stream (including Chemistry) from a recognized board

content_sections.heading: CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 Age Limit
content_sections.text: Age is reckoned as on 01.01.2025 for all three posts. Namuna Sahayak: Minimum 18 years, Maximum 30 years Lab Assistant (Aushadhi): Minimum 18 years, Maximum 30 years Lab Assistant (Khadya): Minimum 18 years, Maximum 30 years Local resident candidates of Chhattisgarh are eligible for 5 years relaxation in the upper age limit, that is, up to 35 years. Candidates belonging to SC, ST, and Other Backward Classes (non-creamy layer) are eligible for a further 5 years relaxation in the upper age limit. As per the Chhattisgarh Civil Service (Special Provision for Appointment of Women) Rules, 1997, women candidates are eligible for a maximum of 10 years relaxation in the upper age limit. Upper age relaxation for local resident candidates of Chhattisgarh is also subject to time-to-time notifications issued by the General Administration Department.

content_sections.heading: CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Salary / Pay Scale
content_sections.text: All three posts, Namuna Sahayak, Lab Assistant (Aushadhi), and Lab Assistant (Khadya), carry the same pay scale. Selected candidates will be appointed on a 3-year probationary period as per Chhattisgarh Civil Service rules.

content_sections.heading: CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: Fee must be paid online at the time of application submission. As per Chhattisgarh Government norms, local resident candidates of Chhattisgarh who appear for the examination will have their exam fee refunded to the same bank account used for payment, after the declaration of results.

content_sections.heading: CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 Selection Process and Exam Pattern
content_sections.text: Selection for all three posts will be made through a written examination conducted by CGSSB, followed by document verification and medical fitness checks by the department. The written exam will be a single question paper of 100 marks, consisting of 100 objective-type questions, each carrying 1 mark. Candidates will get 2 hours to attempt the paper. Each question has four options, and the correct option must be marked on the OMR sheet using a blue or black ballpoint pen. Negative marking applies: 1/4 mark will be deducted for each wrong answer. Final merit will be determined based on marks scored in the written examination. Selection of eligible candidates will be made by the Departmental Selection Committee based on merit. Original certificates of shortlisted candidates will be verified by the Office of the Controller, Food and Drug Administration, Chhattisgarh, before appointment. Selected candidates must produce a fitness certificate from the District Hospital Medical Board before joining service. Police verification (character verification) will be conducted after the candidate joins duty. A waiting list will also be released for these posts, valid for one year from the date of release.

rows.college_exam_centre: Rajiv Gandhi Government P.G. College, Ambikapur
Government E. Raghavendra Rao Post Graduate Science College, Bilaspur
Vishwanath Tamaskar Government Arts and Science College, Durg
Government Nagarjuna P.G. Science College, Raipur

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates are not required to upload caste, date of birth, local residence, educational qualification, disability, or ex-serviceman certificates along with the online application; these will be verified by the appointing authority at the document verification stage. However, candidates must have the following ready and must carry a valid photo ID to the examination centre: Higher Secondary (10+2) mark sheet and certificate (Science stream) Local resident (domicile) certificate of Chhattisgarh Caste/category certificate, where applicable (SC/ST/OBC non-creamy layer) Disability certificate, for candidates applying under the PwBD category Ex-servicemen certificate, where applicable A valid original photo ID proof such as Voter ID Card, Driving Licence, PAN Card, or Aadhaar Card Recent colour photograph and scanned signature in JPG/JPEG format (50 KB to 100 KB) for profile registration Candidates seeking a No Objection Certificate exemption while already working in a government service or recognized institution must submit a No Objection Certificate from their employer before selection.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Local resident candidates of Chhattisgarh can apply online for these posts from 07.07.2026 to 31.07.2026 by following the steps below. Visit the official website vyapamcg.cgstate.gov.in or cgssb.cgstate.gov.in. Complete Profile Registration on the portal, if not already done. Read the departmental recruitment rules and sample application form carefully before applying. Fill in the online application form for the desired post: Namuna Sahayak, Lab Assistant (Aushadhi), or Lab Assistant (Khadya). Pay the prescribed examination fee through online mode. Click "SUBMIT" to finally submit the application after successful fee payment. Take a mandatory printout of the submitted application form and retain it for future reference. Corrections to submitted applications can be made only during the correction window from 01.08.2026 to 03.08.2026.

content_sections.heading: CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 Important Instructions
content_sections.text: Only local residents of Chhattisgarh are eligible to apply for direct recruitment to these posts. Candidates must ensure they meet all eligibility conditions before applying; the responsibility of verifying eligibility lies solely with the candidate. Merely applying or appearing for the examination does not guarantee selection; ineligible candidates can be disqualified at any stage. The number of vacancies advertised is subject to change. Reservation in these recruitments and selection processes is subject to the final order/decision in SLP(C) No. 19668/2022 pending before the Supreme Court of India. Male candidates having more than one living spouse, and female candidates who married such a man, are disqualified from appointment under Chhattisgarh Civil Service (General Conditions of Service) Rules, 1961, except with government exemption. Candidates found to be physically or mentally unfit are not eligible for appointment. If any candidate is found exerting political pressure or influencing the selection process, their application will be rejected and candidature cancelled at any stage. No travel allowance or other allowance will be paid to candidates for appearing in any level of the selection examination. The admit card will be uploaded on the CGSSB website approximately 7 days before the exam and will not be sent by post. Candidates must reach the exam centre at least 2 hours before the exam for frisking and identity verification. Light-coloured, half-sleeve clothing is mandatory; dark-coloured clothing and jewellery are prohibited inside the exam hall. Selected candidates will be appointed on probation for 3 years and must submit a medical fitness certificate and complete police verification before/after joining.

faq.question: Q1. Has CGSSB released the Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026 notification?
faq.answer: Yes, the Office of the Controller, Food and Drug Administration, Chhattisgarh, released the detailed advertisements, and CGSSB released the exam notice dated 06.07.2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The online application closes on 31.07.2026, up to 5:00 PM.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are there in CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 36 total vacancies: 30 for Namuna Sahayak, 3 for Lab Assistant (Aushadhi), and 3 for Lab Assistant (Khadya).

faq.question: Q4. What is the qualification required for Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant posts?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed Higher Secondary (10+2) in Science stream, including Chemistry, from a recognized board.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The age limit is 18 to 30 years as on 01.01.2025, with age relaxation available for local residents of Chhattisgarh, SC/ST/OBC candidates, and women.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant posts in Chhattisgarh?
faq.answer: All three posts carry a pay scale of Rs. 5,200–20,200 with Grade Pay Rs. 1,900 (Pay Level 4).

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The fee is Rs. 350 for General category, Rs. 250 for OBC, and Rs. 200 for SC/ST/PwD candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Is this recruitment open only to local residents of Chhattisgarh?
faq.answer: Yes, only local resident (domicile) candidates of Chhattisgarh are eligible to apply for direct recruitment to these posts.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection is through a written objective-type examination of 100 marks with negative marking, followed by document verification and medical fitness checks.

faq.question: Q10. When is the CGSSB Namuna Sahayak and Lab Assistant exam date?
faq.answer: The exam is tentatively scheduled for 20.09.2026 (Sunday), from 10:00 AM to 12:15 PM, at five divisional district headquarters in Chhattisgarh.
